series_metadata.series_title: PROPOSED AND ADOPTED RULES AND ASSOCIATED RULE-MA
series_metadata.series_description: Proposed and adopted rules and associated rule-making documents filed with LSC. Associated rule-making documents include Rule Summaries and Fiscal Analyses,public hearing notices, agency rule-making guides, non-compliance notifications, executive orders, additional communications, and withdrawal/TBR letters.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Electronic: on server transferred CD-ROM storage and CD-ROMs have been checked quality and completeness. Maintain one set of CD-ROMs in LSC Rules Unit and send a duplicate set of CD-ROMs State Archives
